title: Xp Jellies
description: A simple mod that adds more uses to XP
body:
Xp jellies! A mod that adds a multitude of Xp related things.
Xp jellies adds nine new mobs

- Small XP jelly- Creatures that spawn at night, drops XP jelly glob and alot of xp
- Large XP jelly- Larger variants of XP jellies, drops more XP and jelly globs, can be fed three globs to grow into a titan
- Titan XP jelly- rare giants that drop titan jelly cores and an extreme amount of XP
- XP Snail- Spawns on beaches and in rivers, decently rare. drops its shell
- Titan XP snail- Drops snail shell shards and of course, alot of XP. Can be used to make a new shield
- Glooper- Artifical creature of XP that can be used to make glooper based foods
The mod also adds a way to create the mending book with some of the much more rare resources, it also adds a new enchantment that allows the player to gain more xp per kill.

THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB!

**_PLEASE NOTE THAT THERE IS MORE FEATURES THAT LISTED, PLEASE DO NOT JOIN THE DISCORD, OR PERSONALLY MESSAGE ME ASKING ABOUT IT IF IT IS NOT TO YOUR LIKING._**
